channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: 13 months of consistent investing and I’ve breached 50K am I GMI? — 35 replies — 58.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
13 months of consistent investing and I’ve breached 50K am I GMI?

Open thread • Replies: 35 • Updated: 2026-04-11 17:01 UTC

OP

13 months of consistent investing and I’ve breached 50K am I GMI?

Early replies (first 3)

62100428
>>62100422
which stocks

62100432
>>62100422
Based

62100469
5 digit heaven

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62100519
>>62100474
>complain about people making it
>NEEDS to still try and gloat
Actual factual 3rd world poster, 100%

62100943
>>62100428
DCA into VOO lmao
Did a little bit of SCHD then realized it doesn’t matter right now
But the return on that is 20% cause it shot up so….
>>62100506
Nope I was less than 10k, bought a dip at the first tariff announcement
>>62100432
Ty
Next stop 100k
Trying to get side hustles to squeeze as much money out of my youth as possible

62101150
>>62100943
All in SCHD

62101884
>>62101150
For why

62101894
>>62100474
Negro can you do basic math?

62101942
how old are u

62101947
>>62100422
yes good job

62102902
>>62101942
let's just say i should've started younger (sub 30 y/o tho)

62102919
>>62100422
If its good enough to screenshot its good enough to sell. You wont listen though. Have fun OP.

62102928
>>62102919
no reason to sell

62103196
>>62100422
Ngmi

62103218
>>62100943
Don't waste your youth chasing dollars. Don't be a degenerate either though.

62103270
This is unironically enough for a down payment on a couple houses in my area that would net you 1,000 cashflow a month, good job OP.

62103291
>>62100422
That's a horrible yearly wage.

62103329
>>62100422
Yes

62103345
>>62101884
Set and forget investing is underrated and SCHD is the king of that category. At least max your Roth IRA with SCHD.

62103349
>>62100422
>am I GMI?
Yep. Keep it up for only 20 years and you can retire as a millionaire unless inflation fucks you.

62103354
>>62100943
I went from 29k to 58k in 9 months here in Europe. Good job, anon.

62103407
>>62100422
this is the textbook way of doing it. id put 10k in MSFT now and wait a year to sell

62103516
>>62100474
>im still wealthier than you btw
>t.

62103545
>>62103354
What stock? You can't trade American stocks in Europe

62103565
>>62103545
Not one stock and of course I worked and saved money.

62103571
>>62100422
Congrats OP
>am I GMI
Yes fren, wagmi

62103694
>>62103345
My idea was whatever snowball happens from SCHD stock and dividend ratio growth would not outweigh total market returns but maybe I’m wrong
Hard to say cause it just shot up in value by twenty percent cause people wanted stability but then it flatlined

62103698
>>62103516
>>62100519

62103710
>>62103698
>french
Quot erat demonstrandum.

62103720
>>62103710
richer than you, despite the fact that you make 200k per year and me only 50k

skill issue i guess

62103721
>>62103698
en une heure?

62103726
>SCHD
>quarterly dividends
EWW no thank you only monthly payers for me, pay me like i’m your world of warcraft subscription baby

62104160
>>62103218
Oh yeah
I mostly focus on a lot of easy stuff I can passively do at work or home (have my own office at work and can use my phone)

item.title: So, now that assblaster was confirmed controlled opposition, and LINK holders have become "the Cuckolds of Crypto"... — 70 replies — 74.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
So, now that assblaster was confirmed controlled opposition, and LINK holders have become "the Cuckolds of Crypto"...

Open thread • Replies: 70 • Updated: 2026-04-11 16:40 UTC

OP

So, now that assblaster was confirmed controlled opposition, and LINK holders have become "the Cuckolds of Crypto"... shouldn't we have a look at what he told us *not* to buy?

He tried very hard to steer us away from one coin in particular back in 2018.

They wanted you out.

Early replies (first 3)

62077049
well he was right about raiblocks

62077089
>>62077049
Only in the sense that he was "right" about LINK. It's price did go up, yet it achieved nothing. Sergey met Trump and still nobody cares about smartcontracts. LINK had every chance to succeed but failed.

>Controlled opposition is a political or strategic tactic where a governing body, organization, or elite group secretly supports, infiltrates, or manages its own opposition to manipulate dissent, control narratives, and prevent real challenges to the status quo

A functional stateless currency would challenge the status quo, and now it's been "over 5 years under the radar".

Watch how long this thread stays up.

62077098
>>62077000
>>62077049
>>62077089
Bullish for XRP

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62081755
>>62080485
thread's still up because I didn't use "the N word"

Any threads that explicitly state Raiblock's new name or ticker quickly get taken out.

Don't believe me?

It's all in the archives

https://warosu.org/biz/thread/59678970
https://warosu.org/biz/thread/59678347
https://warosu.org/biz/thread/59671138
https://warosu.org/biz/thread/59600393
https://warosu.org/biz/thread/59538201

62082372
>>62078703
It's game over for stinkies

62082722
>>62078703
BOOOOOOOOOOOM

cuckolds of crypto!

62082884
>>62078703
remember when hillary talking about pepe was a big deal

62083016
>>62080684
why exactly did this site die off so quickly

x is awful and they're always changing the algorithms
plebbit hasn't been useable for at least 6 years due to insane moderation
every traditional forum is dead

where the hell did everyone go

62083040
>>62083016
Crypto isn't exciting since 2017 ended

Why?

Because people forgot what we were doing here to begin with

People forgot about Raiblocks

Tonight, they will be reminded

62084453
>>62083016
Moot was a spineless coward and Hiroshimoot doesn't give two shits about anything so long as the ad money stays flowing, so White men left for Twitter, a website that actually has influence on things.

62084638
>>62084453
>muh tweets are makin' a difference
they're just as useless as 4chan posts

62085762
>>62084453
yeah that makes sense
just sucks because the format here is so much easier to read

62085897
fuck all stinkies hate em all think they suck\fuck all stinkies hate em all think they suck\fuck all stinkies hate em all think they suck

62087388
>>62078703
Cuckolds of crypto

62087403
hug all stinkies love em all think theyre great\hug all stinkies love em all think theyre great\hug all stinkies love em all think theyre great

62091446
>>62078703
Cuckolds of crypto
u
c
k
o
l
d
s

o
f

c
r
y
p
t
o

62092518
>>62085762
Yeah but after 2016 a bunch of NGOs freaked out and 4chan became a huge target to destroy, so they did that and now every board is dead except for the big three and the only thing left here is a tranny Discord raiding group run by a Paki (I've unfortunately met the guy IRL). Twitter is a target too, of course, but while Elon is retarded and his pet jeets break the site, he's got 10% more of a spine than Moot ever did, so we seem to be safe for now.

62092795
If you bought the "make it stack" back in 2018. How have you not killed yourself.
Only swingies made it or big boys with their 100k stacks.

62093751
>>62087403
shut up stinkbag
you lost the game of life

62095975
>>62078703
>a singular tree

62100199
cuckolds!

62100381
>>62077089
Link is still like 7% inflation.
We still got a few years for "cheapies"
Lines right up with economic collapse time-frames tho.

62100386
>>62100381
Thought experiment:

What would happen to the price of nano if the inventor of nano shook the US President's hand?

That is why they wanted you to buy LINK instead

62100392
>>62100381
>Link is still like 7% inflation.
Bitcoin had triple digit inflation when it pumped the hardest.
ETH had 10% inflation when it pumped the hardest.
Solana had over 500% inflation when it pumped the hardest.

If you want to go more recent:
Sui had 200% inflation when it pumped the hardest.
Hyperliquid had 25% inflation when it pumped from rank 200+ to rank 10.

Stop being this fucking stupid.

62100973
>>62100386
>What would happen to the price of nano if the inventor of nano shook the US President's hand?


you sound like a boomer yelling at the sky
how does running up to a podium and shaking the hand of the least credible president in the united states' 250 year history accrue value to you a funding altcoin

62101022
>>62100392

so your logic is that because the top few crypto assets with mass appeal pumped x amount despite inflationary tokenomics, that means your funding coin should too?

let me state the obvious which is that there isn't enough liquidity for this happen across 30 million altcoins

should the rocks in my backyard also pump in value because gold went up?
should houses in the trailer park also pump the same as waterfront mansions because real estate went up?
should you get laid more because more women are becoming whores?

62101041
>>62100381
I’ve noticed Sergey tends to drop news when there is very bearish things happening in the world. Everything about this project seems like it wants as few eyes on it as possible. Very strange.

62101064
>>62101022
HUBRIS

62101272
>>62100973
Because my altcoin actually threatens the system

Yours is token not needed

62102231
>>62077000
So, now that OP is confirmed opposition, time to remind him: the pool is closed.

62102327
>>62077784
Revenue streams will multiple by orders of magnitude over the next few years. Price will follow naturally.

62103489
>>62101022
I didn't claim inflation means it should pump. How fucking dumb are you.

62104109
>>62103489
>comparing POW to market selling on a CEX
>comparing a supply of 21 million to 1 fucking billion
>unable to comprehend that inflation is a death spiral when there are 0 incentives to create buying pressure
seriously, how fucking dumb are you to even use this shitty argument in 2017+9

item.title: So — 18 replies — 72.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
So

Open thread • Replies: 18 • Updated: 2026-04-11 17:28 UTC

OP

Is there a reason I shouldn't just buy PLTR and be set for life?

Early replies (first 3)

62103602
women are so useless

im so thankful not being interested by them anymore

>MUH KIDS

imagine having a daughter

62103607
>>62103602
Nobody cares

62103633
>>62103602
>>62103607
Bitching about women is BetaSimp behavior. Praising and drooling over women is BetaSimp behavior.

Just live your fucking life. I met a married woman on a dating app and started hanging out with her as friends. This gave me access to her friend group and one of her single friends.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62103645
>>62103633
>friendzoned by a married whore that wanted to cheat on her husband
EVERYBODY LAUGH AT THIS FAGGOT LOL

62103647
>>62103645
I literally fucked her friend. This reply doesn't even make sense. I got exactly what I wanted out of the situation.

62103680
>>62103645
he was projecting hard when he talked about betasimping

dude got friendzoned by a 140 kg baby mama in Arkansas and got to lick the pussy of her methead roastie friend and now he thinks he is the hot shit on 4chan

62103682
>>62103602
My daughter is so awesome but she’s only 3. If she acts like this when she’s older I will beat her ass.

62103685
>>62103680
Bro it’s not healthy to be this angry online at anon strangers. Get a fucking grip.

62103689
>>62103682
your daughter will get HIV from fucking Jamal

62103699
>>62103685
Dude's trippin.

62103708
>>62103572
> 202 pe ratio

62104084
>>62103572
I love both these women and think they're based.

62104087
>>62103572
smarter if you did it at $10

62104090
>>62103708
he's who the early investors sell to

62104129
>>62103572
Idk what is this clown bs, but i want to out my erect penis into their holes, if you catch my drift.

62104133
>>62104129
Put*

62104137
>>62103572
Shrump mentioned it.
Ergo, it's now cursed.

62104228
>>62103602
Eh, ya know , after 3 sons in a row my daughter is a nice change of pace. They're more loving. She'll probably learn to cook from her mama and cook for me when she gets older. Seems okay.

>inb4 - BUT SHE'LL HAVE SEX WITH A MAN SOME DAY

Have sex incels.

item.title: Should EU countries have a power to strongly dissuade other member states from committing economical sudoku? — 51 replies — 41.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
Should EU countries have a power to strongly dissuade other member states from committing economical sudoku?

Open thread • Replies: 51 • Updated: 2026-04-11 16:23 UTC

OP

Should EU countries have a power to strongly dissuade other member states from committing economical sudoku? The example is Germany -- decided to shut down its nuke plants during the Russia energy crisis. Should other EU members be able to call for an intervention to get such a self-destructive crackhead back on track?

Germany economical failures thread.

Early replies (first 3)

62103567
>>62103558
>puccian propaganda
>"gice germany destroys itself blyat"

62103569
>>62103567
You hohols are so insufferable its incredible.
>>62103558
No EU should not get more powers, they should get less.

62103573
>>62103567
Also wtf is propaganda? That we did shut down our power plants? That we are on the way down with incredible quick increasing costs for boomer pensions, migrants, incredible slow and incabable bureaucrazy and foreign countries.....like ukraine.
And no this is not some internet doomer thing, germany is economically unironically done and it will show hard this decade.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62103716
>>62103613
>everybody i dont like is russian
mental illness
>>62103615
Kanacke oder wat?
>>62103615
>off-grid electricity
Dunkelflaute noch nie gehört? Viel Glück bei Windstille und keiner Sonne.

62103733
>>62103716
>muh Dunkelflaute
Dafür ist der Wasserstoffausbau. Nutz KI, du kompletter Vollidiot.

62103737
>>62103715
>defending your country is "glowniggardry"
Ok MIGAtard. Arent there a few circumsized cocks to suck for you?

62103740
>>62103615
How does shutting down nuclear help with independence from the turd world? Germanistan just became MORE dependent on russia you retarded Saupreiß

62103749
>>62103740
Its expensive, inflexible and the Endlagerung is still an unsolved issue. 40% of the fission material came from russia either. Solar power, sun to fuel and hydrogen are Hitlerite technologies. Just kill yourself.

62103764
spineless whining is still the largest german export it see

62103779
>>62103558
>elect anti nuke open border idiots
>country is literally destroyed
hopefully voters choose correctly soon

62103787
>>62103749
france is 70% nuclear and has lower electricity prices and carbon emissions per capita.

62103795
>>62103779
Parasites will literally move elsewhere, if we make our energy infrastructure kriegstauglich, off-grid and redundant, because that costs a shit ton of money, especially opportunity costs are high as you can see in this thread full of complainers.

62103796
>>62103737
>>62103715
wrong board faggots

62103797
>>62103749
I asked how does it help with independence from the turd world, you gave me a bunch of unrelated buzzwords.
>prussian
>talking about the austrian man Hitler
I hope russia nukes everything north of the Donau

62103799
>>62103787
Its not about carbon emissions, people who still use these 2010 talkingpoints are full of shit (yeah our puppet politicians too).

62103803
>>62103797
Too bad I am living south of the Danube, moron. Look retard, diversifying your energy sector is as good as diversifying your assets.

62103804
>>62103799
that chart is of prices bro

the claim "nuclear is expensive"
the reality "power is cheaper in 70% nuclear france"

62103809
>>62103795
>Parasites will literally move elsewhere
your brain literally may not work bro

they have been coming for decades and that wont stop until the standard of living is lower than where they are coming from.

62103813
>>62103803
shutting down nuclear power did not diversify your energy sector. it did the opposite.

62103816
>>62103804
Germany had three remaining reactors post 2022. Were talking about stuff we have, not stuff we wish wed have. Also France has a lower population density and huge backwater land for guerilla conflict. Germany literally nukes its own core population just so some boomers can have cheap shit. Not gonna happen.

62103823
>>62103809
>let me tell you about your country
Lion share of foreigners here are EU migrants, its not my fault and not Ursulas fault that females do not breed on an overpopulated wealthy continent.

62103946
>>62103733
>mein quelle ist ki daher weiß ich das das funktioniert
Tut es nicht. Wasserstoff ist nicht für das Stromnetz. Das Stromnetz würde jeden Abend zusammenbrechen du absoluter Dimwit. Aber das wäre gut dann würden die Leute mal aufgerührt.

62103952
>>62103823
>Lion share of foreigners here are EU migrants
Why do you lie? ´

62103958
>>62103946
Ich arbeite in der Branche, Wasserstoff/Biogas ist buchstäblich für die Spitzenüberbrückung. Halt einfach deine dumme Fresse.

62103960
>>62103952
Sorry Ghetto dweller. Obviously I speak from my middle class neighbourhood.

62103969
>>62103960
OH YES OF COURSE ITS ALWAYS THE SAME WITH YOU SCUM
>diversity but not for me haha
Good neighborhood is a codeword for white neighborhood.
Guys like you are the worst
>>62103958
>Ich arbeite in der Branche,
No you dont
>Wasserstoff/Biogas ist buchstäblich für die Spitzenüberbrückung.
Spitzenüberbrückung ja genau SPITZENüberbrückung. There you see you just got this from AI and dont know shit about it. Its only good to smooth it over the day. Its never enough to save enough for a whole week of cloudy windless weather. And i dont want to start about winter. Its mostly for cars and there its a good idea. Not for the power system.
Holy retard

62103974
>>62103958
Btw im not saying it cant work with 2040 technology. But it doesnt work with 2026 technology. No way to save enough gas.

62103984
>>62103969
>I am a poorfag pleb
Go back to pol then you fucking tourist.

>hydrogen I-is not for the grid
You goalpost moving retard. It is for the grid, the Bundesregierung advances its capabilities to decentraly produce electrical energy via highly mobile gas engines.

62103988
>>62103974
It already is working, 2030 data centers are going to rely on hydrogen-ready technology. Moron.

62103996
>>62103558
Merkel knew that a big war is coming and that nuclear facilities will be primary targets once all red lines have been crossed. She then used the Fukushima happening asa scapegoat to ban nuclear power plants.

62104052
>>62103996
Retarded cope.

62104077
>>62103558
Nuclear power makes sense when there's high sustained demand.
Germany shares a border with 9 other countries. There's always the possibility of buying / selling electricity to balance the grid. Fluctuating renewables also make nuclear less attractive.
Then there's specialization going on inside the EU and France happens to make the nukes and the nuclear stuff. This way Germany can host the largest conventional military without becoming too threatening to its neighbors.

62104083
>>62104077
This guy gets it. Heil EVROPA.

item.title: ITT: we discuss the upcoming weekend psyop — 30 replies — 34.8/hr

ITT: we discuss the upcoming weekend psyop

Open thread • Replies: 30 • Updated: 2026-04-11 16:45 UTC

OP

so, lets brainstorm together

Early replies (first 3)

62102793
>>62102780

62102802
>>62102780
white women are superior

62102805
>>62102780
Ooof my cock! To be staying on topic, idc, its elon doge tweet levels at this point.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62102811
>>62102780
i prefer right

62102814
>>62102780

62102820
>>62102814
Its the definition of me on the left!

62102824
>>62102780
Fuck the Jap
Kill the White
Marry the Moon

62102847
>>62102780
Lets say usa is distancing itself from btc and crypto because ebil terrorists using it for oil toll.

62102932
>>62102780
>>62102802
>>62102824

if that white woman had the same temperament and body odor type of a japanese woman, then she'd be the perfect human.

if that japanese woman had the same temperament and body odor type of a white bitch then she'd be SEAmonkey nigger-tier.

facts.

maybe the answer is in russian asian cuties i.e. tatars (not that elliot rodger kike+seamonkey hapa shit).

62102974
>>62102805
yes, yes, I know Trump might rant-post something that will make the ((((markets)))) panic or go full bull, but wich way is it?

62102982
>>62102932
as a heterosexual man, I like my women stinky

62103027
>>62102982
>as a heterosexual man, I like my women stinky

stinky means they just have primitive digestive, excretory, endocrine, and gland systems.

are you saying you like blacks and pajeets over the less smelly whites and japanese?

62103051
>>62102780
me on the left

62103061
>>62103027
> stinky means they just have primitive digestive, excretory, endocrine, and gland systems.
Grok is this true?

62103078
>>62102780
Looks like the moon is an assmoon.

62103107
>>62102780
Fucking hell Japan.

62103236
>>62102780
BOOBA

62103305
>>62102811
You dont have a choice so you better prefer right kek

62103311
>>62103051
would

62103312
>>62102932
Your mind will be healthier if you stop thinking so much about this stuff

62103338
>>62103107
There's an ai watermark in the bottom right corner

Society is cooked when people like you don't think hard enough for yourselves

62103341
>>62102932
i have never smelled a bad woman other than africans and hispanic (central america)

62103355
>>62102780
Left is so sexy god damn.

62103360
>>62103338
>fooled by AI
>goes to AI to explain it
>AI convinces him it's even worse than it looks
kek

62103584
>>62103355
Aryan

62103598
>>62102780
thats some insane mogging wtf

62103612
>>62103584
Claryan.

62103730
>>62103598
yes.

62103773
>>62102780
Going to see a movie with my dad :)

62104120

item.title: Why aren’t you holding BTC? — 76 replies — 32.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
Why aren’t you holding BTC?

Open thread • Replies: 76 • Updated: 2026-04-11 15:17 UTC

OP

If you’re still watching or waiting to buy BTC, why not do it now?
>I guess you’re wasting time, or maybe you just prefer altcoins. What’s your reason?

Early replies (first 3)

62087977
>>62087937
I only watch it to laugh at Saylor and you bitsteinbaggies. Not buying digital nothing.

62087993
>>62087937
Waiting for sub60K

62087997
>>62087937
I don't have enough money for it to make me rich. Alts have a good chance of vastly outperforming BTC during the next big pump. I've decided to take the potential for a 10x over the guarantee of a 2x.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62097432
The smuggest BTC maxxis all have like 1-10k invested into it.
Absolutely pathetic and what's even the point.
Adapt the maxi religion when you at least pass $500k.

62097583
>>62097432
You start spending less time here when you realize the vast majority of posters on this board have less than 20k in whatever position/coin/fomo shit they are trying legitimize as the new standard because that's essentially their life savings and instead of just neeting they could have just worked a few years to save way more money. It's pathetic and sad

62097887
>>62096116
yeah these all or nothing people are mentally ill

62099195
>>62097432
>>62097583
I have 0.33 bitcoin via ETFs in a Roth. We'll see where it is in three decades.

62099777
>>62091414
Ok but it's pumping lately

62100009
>>62096707
you're only looking for headaches if you want that way. Most protocols are only rugging us inside job

62100014
>>62099195
You need 10bitcoins if you're in your 30s

62100192
>>62100009
Yeah, plenty of rugs out there, but not everything is some random anon farm. a16z and Ledger wouldn’t get involved if there wasn’t real potential here.

62100194
>>62091478
we're all here to make money lol

62100201
>>62087937
I unironically only buy LINK
not shilling, don't give a shit anymore, I'm just going to keep stacking it for my kids to use for collateralised loans when DeFi goes maistream

62100233
>>62100201
You're shilling chainglink

62100295
>>62099777
when 2x

62100334
>>62087937
I'm all in on BTC, nothing else, I staked some, most especially now that TBV is gaining traction and most BTCFI are keeping BTC native, I believe this is a huge chance BTC hit 200K this year

62100530
>>62087937
I do and my boomer index funds like spy are outperforming it. So do my PM`s. The only reason I hold is because its tax free after 12 months, thats literally and unironically it.

62101348
>>62100334
Makes sense. Once TBVs integrate with Aave V4, BTC collateral demand could scale quickly and unlock much deeper liquidity in BTCFi.

62101354
>>62091551
You can't judge based on that lol

62101365
>>62091723
that’s basically how all markets work when you think about it.

62102223
>>62100192
Ledger is cool

62102233
>>62100530
Wtf is that

62102249
>>62101348
I see aave v3 is better

62102256
>>62100233
Shylink shitlink

62102324
>>62102223
Yeah and being able to interact with DeFi there with millions of users while keeping self custody makes everything feel a lot safer and more seamless.

62102341
>>62091734
You should have ordered healthy foodies kek

62102346
>>62102233
a teenager

62102364
>>62102249
V3 is solid. V4 just went live a few weeks ago. Deposits are still ramping up. Kinda pointless comparing that to years of development. Give it time anon.

62102377
>>62095458
reread it anon

62102716
>>62087997
I made this same mistake in the last cycle. Trust me, all the liquidity will go into BTC, so it's better to buy and keep it on TBVs for yield instead of going for alts

62103228
>>62097432
The smuggest are newfags because they're trying to build their own conviction by mimicking the toxic maximalsm during the fork wars. The oldfags have either all left or have the ability to laugh at one's own expense. Bitcoin still hasn't done anything meaningful and "orange pilling" your retarded friends doesn't help. I consider myself a closet maxi because I do believe in bitcoin but I'd never associate with them or go to a meetup/conference.

62103805
>>62095600
For many bullish reasons

62103981
>>62095620
And are you expecting what then?

item.title: any WFH chads can you tell me how you found your job I have hospitality, customer service and even low level management… — 53 replies — 30.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
any WFH chads can you tell me how you found your job I have hospitality, customer service and even low level management…

Open thread • Replies: 53 • Updated: 2026-04-11 15:53 UTC

OP

any WFH chads can you tell me how you found your job
I have hospitality, customer service and even low level management experience but im not getting any offers on my applications
Should I get some cyber security certs? which ones should I focus on if yes?

Early replies (first 3)

62084718
Funny of you to ask OP, I remember my struggles of landing my first WFH job. Btw, WFH stands for Work from Home because not many people come across that term usually. But, if you must ask, our company is headquartered in Nashville. My base pay is 95k per year along with a COL stipend and generous health and pension benefits. As we speak, I am clocked into my position in the beautiful hot springs in British Columbia. We do have an RTO policy, but I haven't been to the office in 4 years! Ha-Ha! You COULDN'T pay me to work in the office. Yesterday I had fun fucking a uni student that transferred from china for the school years, so yeah life is great so far. Today she is making me her traditional Chinese dinner as a thank you for fucking her so nicely. Maybe next month I'll fly out to Holland and do my job for the month. But like I said OP, keep your chin up and don't be disuaded by the multiple rejection emails in your future until you get that golden offer. Take it and run with it. Anyways .... Chiao!

62084729
>>62084718
thanks for the response anon
Did you use indeed or pay for a website that specializes in WFH jobs like flexjobs etc? I'm wondering if indeed is just all scams at this point and if it might be worth it to pay a job finding website to filter the garbage

62084746
There are no jobs anymore. 200,000 people have been laid off in the last six months while job creation is negative. 90% of job openings go to immigrants anyway.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62088526
>>62084678
I got laid off from my last job in March 2025. I was WFH, thanks to covid we all went WFH. 9 years at the company and genuinely the top guy. I was team lead, I did the training, I wrote the manuals, I had the highest numbers. I worked in fraud prevention for ecomm. I went to meetings with the big dogs while my manager who knew less about our programs stayed with the rest of the team. I loved my bosses. They loved me. I got laid off after training 10 Filipinos. So did the rest of our NA Fraud team and our manager. Replaced by the Flips. I job hunted with good references and great resume. I only got 2 interviews in 6 months, finally landed a shitty call center job. Had to take it because I needed work.

No one is hiring WFH unless you're something special or have certs others cant easily get. Why pay you 20+/hr when they can hire a flip for 2.50/hr. You can do more work? Okay, I can hire 4 flips and its still less than hiring you. If not flips, indians.

62088548
>>62084678
I'm going back to school for cyber security. What certs do you recommend? I have a security clearance which I hope gets me an entry level job at least

62088565
>>62084678
I was in my job for 8 years then Covid hit and we all just went home permanently. There was a 2 year period where we weren’t sure if we were going to come back to the office or not, but finally they said we were permanently remote.

62088593
>>62084678
I took an internship straight out of college (2018) which turned into a software dev job. Am senior dev now. We went fully remote during covid and have been ever since

62088599
>>62088526
This kind of disloyalty should be punishable by public hanging

62088666
>>62088599
yup I agree. my boss' hands were tied, he is still there, the flips are dogshit and theyve had to hire even more to try and cover all the work the American team was doing. They have a flip manager too. Not a single American on the entire ecomm fraud team. Bossman says its only a matter of time until the entire company is flips. I don't have anything against the flips, some of them were really cool. And it's not like they caused me to get laid off. Its the greedy Indian CEO who caused it. And Id much rather hear a Pilipino accent than an Indian accent if I ever had to call in to speak to customer service.

62090239
>>62088548
Grow a neck beard and get fat because it’s worked for every other cyber security worker

62090283
>>62086811
this and other anons are right. Stop focusing on getting hired and focus on making content designed to piss off glowies. That’s a market that is actually growing. AI content especially. Just look at all the popular YouTube channels. You either need to make ai slop or Candace Owens, Tucker Carlson, Jimmy Dore, Theo Von, Dave Smith type stuff. Anti-Israel content like greyzone, etc

Most people here are thinking working for the man is the answer but the right answer is destroying what the man has built

62090311
>>62088526
>No one is hiring WFH unless you're something special or have certs others cant easily get.
I’ve gotten like 5 or 6 wfh jobs between 2022-2026 just by lying on my resume. Getting offers is definitely harder than it was back then but not impossible. I think if anything I’m overqualified, hence why I’ve had so many interviews but not many offers recently, so I just took off one job and slightly extended the timeline on another one.

62090709
>>62088526
Imagine getting replace by the pagpag eater

62090732
>>62084678
Be indispensable at your job. Say you're going to move and can either work remote from home or find another job. Watch them find a way to let you work remote. Simple as.

62090748
Mine came naturally after years of working in the tech field. If you study Azure a.k.a Entra, Exchange Admin, Sharepoint Admin, InTune, ETC, you'll move from the nerd who tells retards how to reboot their computers to endpoint management or some kind of administrator. Most of those jobs can be done from anywhere. You just get a company laptop, connect to a VPN.

62090930
>>62084718
based

62091196
Got an interview coming up for a WFH job as a claims adjuster. Paid training and all. Starting off is 64k a year. Much better than my shitty county job. I hope I get it.

62091298
>>62091196
Good luck anon. I have a good feeling you’ll get it

62092902
>>62088548
>what certs?
Welding or something else actually valuable

62093225
>>62084678
You too buddy. Thank you!

62093956
>>62091196
you got this anon

62093995
>>62084678
Thanks for the image OP. I've been in a bad spot mentally lately due to some stuff that happened, but will keep going now instead of trying to convince myself to give up.

62095273
>>62093995
Bases resilient anon

62097589
>>62084678
I'm a civil engineer, originally in the office before covid, but the position turned into a WFH position during covid and we never really went back.

62097818
>>62084678
I do WFH cybersecurity for a bank but I have massive experience and credentials and have literally worked with (not at) the NSA and I was still out of work almost 2 years.
I mean it's good if you can get a job. It would help a lot if you're black or a woman and I'm not kidding.

62097824
>>62084803
>technical writing
Lol AI can already replace that entire career field.

62097830
>>62085875
>>62085904
>>62085904
>>62087410
Correct. It is a gay fake job suitable for DEI hires.
You need to do hard-core real work as a white man. Cyber is now where companies stick their women and blacks.

62097875
>>62084718
This was me but moved to Poland on 125k USD / yr.

>>62084729
There are tons of remote job sites and even lang specific ones. I shifted to golang and can't imagine anyone works from the office in this lang.

62098209
>>62097875
>Poland on 125k USD / yr.
Damn, baller. Nobody in the U.S. would even interview me for remote cybersecurity jobs unless I was in certain states.

62100225
>>62097830
>it’s for females and minorities
That’s probably why your gay ass works in cyber security

62103272
>>62084678
Bump

62103921
>>62084678
I was on Fiver years ago, got banned after I agreed with a client to just work with them over email, and ive done it ever since.

62104035
>>62084678
I work in tech and not for public companies. Startup unicorns are still usually wfh

item.title: >filing taxes >only own index funds on Vanguard >have some short term capital loss listed on my tax documents despite ne… — 19 replies — 26.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
>filing taxes >only own index funds on Vanguard >have some short term capital loss listed on my tax documents despite ne…

Open thread • Replies: 19 • Updated: 2026-04-11 16:54 UTC

OP

>filing taxes
>only own index funds on Vanguard
>have some short term capital loss listed on my tax documents despite never buying the stock or selling anything
>apparently one of the mutual funds sold some minuscule amount of the portfolio (?)
>now I have to pay an extra 60 fucking dollars on turbo tax just to report a fucking $10 LOSS
FUCK THIS GAY EARTH

Early replies (first 3)

62099722
>>62099715
maybe they'll let it slide, it's a loss after all :^)

62099741
>>62099715
Imagine being so incredibly tight that you had to go and create an entire thread to kvetch over sixty shekels, get fucked you cheap fuck.

62099790
>>62099715
There are free filing options anon

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62099798
>tranime

62099880
>>62099715
Do your taxes by hand then.
I've done it for few years and i learned alot understanding how all that shit works and how i can optimize my taxes.

62099897
>>62099715
hey retard, if your income is low then you can use free software instead of turbojew
i use taxslayer which has free version for the poors

62099921
>>62099715
Why are you paying taxes on a loss

62099922
>>62099921
he needs to identify himself to the government for his trump check that will never arrive

62100178
>pay 60 bucks to report a 10 dollar loss instead of just not reporting it
>he reinvested the dividends within +/- 30 days and triggered a wash sale
>double head shot

62100220
>>62099715
is there not a personal allowance before paying tax?

62100259
I paid $650 for hr block to file my taxes. I'll shop around more next year but I just couldn't be fucked especially with the insane amount of trades I did last year

62100286
>>62099715
>paying to do your taxes
holy third world

62101093
>>62100259
You are getting fucked in your ass by your accountant. Everything is automated nowadays, just upload the forms

62101134
>>62100259
I can't fathom a world in which that's necessary. To be fair I trade futures actively and just buy and hold ETFs... but my 700+ trades in futures just get consolidated on the tax documents and it takes about 5 seconds to enter it on freetaxusa. For other stuff the PDF upload will generally grab everything and automatically fill it out. Might take a bit to get familiar with their website but it takes me 5 minutes now to get everything sent off. They charge $16 for the state filing and the federal is free.

62101196
>>62101093
Turbotax fucks up importing forms all the time, even forms from Schwab that they are supposed to be good at parsing. I spent 5 hours dealing with this bullshit this year. If you trade a lot, have a business, and your time is worth $120/hr, paying $650 is not bad.

62101252
>>62099715
you know filing is optional right? you are an american you dont have to be a slave for kikes dude

62101345
>>62101196
Your time isn't worth 120/hr, althoughbeit.

62102776
>>62100178
You either didn't actually understand what OP wrote, or you don't understand the wash sale rule, or you're just pretending to be retarded on the internet for the lulz.

62104147
Just make gemini file your taxes.

item.title: Polkadot - First halving — 292 replies — 21.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
Polkadot - First halving

Open thread • Replies: 292 • Updated: 2026-04-11 03:46 UTC

OP

https://polkadothalving.com/ 10 more days. https://www.parity.io/blog/refining-polkadots-economic-architecture-issuance-DOT-DAP-and-network-adjustments
https://x.com/Polkadot/status/2028482336463945765
"
Polkadot’s economic upgrade begins rolling out in 10 days.

Enhanced tokenomics increases DOT scarcity and introduces new governance and staking mechanisms.

▸ DOT supply capped at 2.1B
▸ Emissions cut 53.6%
▸ Unbonding from 28 days to 24-48 hours
"

Early replies (first 3)

61933757
Guys?

61933779
>>61932834
10000$ @ 6.5
i dont sell my dotty

61936705
Guys?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62086622
>>62085250
Even if you just google "Does polkadot use a subset of rust or rust?"
It'll say "
Polkadot uses Rust—specifically, modern, full-featured Rust—rather than a restricted subset of the language.
Polkadot is built on the Substrate framework, which is designed from the ground up in Rust to ensure memory safety and high performance, critical for blockchain infrastructure.
"
So, I have no clue where you're getting your information from. The thing is I'm a programmer and what you said seems so akward. You're basically trying to imply that you can take just a subset of the functionality of Rust. A "confusing" subset of a programming language. Like what? You only take the else statement without the if? Can you elaborate? I guess you probably can't because either you're spreading FUD or you've been manipulated into something that isn't real.

62087253
>>61932834
Not even Larp Davis shills this gay little coin anymore.

62087258
>>61948998
>We've got a true nazi over here.
See? Nobody cares.

62087587
>>62087253
>>62087258
So, what's your point exactly? Thank you for the bump

62087811
>>62087587
My point is, Lark Davis has forsaken you. It's ogre.

62088494
>>62087811
Ok, that's great you informed us. And so what's your point again? I still don't see it.

62088504
>>62087811
Like, how does that do anything for me or anyone? Like what's your point in regard to how that affects DOT? Or anything? I really don't see a connection

62089608
I hope you guys slurped the bottom. We're cooking now, boys.


Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62091358
1.33>13 DECEMBER

62093297
>>62085250
>and then scrambling to make an EVM to attract more developers
Actually, even this is not completely really true to be honest. The whole point of DOT 1.0 was to be able to make L2s. That was done and complete and there's like 40 L2s running on DOT. Then DOT 2.0 came and with it came Asset hub. Asset hub is a COMMON GOOD L2 that can run, as you've mentioned, EVM smart contracts and also PVM smart contracts which are SUPERIOR to EVM because the use the RISC-V architecture. You literally make it seem like launching EVM compatibility is a bad choice where in reality it's a move forward in order to make the chain more flexible.

https://polkadot.polkassembly.io/referenda/1864 Deploy Universal Deterministic Deployment Proxy (CREATE2 Factory) on Asset Hub
This ref passed today making it so that people can launch their EVM smart contracts on the same address as they have on ETH or other L2s. So Uniswap will soon launch on Asset Hub on the same address as they're on ETH or any other L2.

62093456
>OP is desperate to shill his heavy bags.

62093506
>>62093456
>>OP is desperate to shill his heavy bags.
Actually I'm from Mumbai and Gavin Wood is paying the Mumbai warrior gang to keep the thread alive. I've already collected 11.5k DOT and every day after day 30 I get an additional 150 DOT. The thread is 35 days old. So I got 11.5k DOT + 5*150 DOT.
P.S.: Thank you Arjun for bumping the thread and giving me an excuse to re-bump it again. I'll come over to your house later and give you the money we were talking about. Good job my young Vishnu Mumbai warrior.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62093917
>Poopman loves his gay little coin
I'm NOT a Vishnu Mumbai warrior. I'm Muslim!!!!

62094207
>>62093917
Nice, keep on bumping the thread Arjun, my little Mumbai warrior muslim living in Mumbai, the city of DOT. See you at the mosque on Sunday my little Mumbai warrior. Keep the bumps coming. I'll give you more DOT on Sunday for you effort.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62094396
>>62094207
>See you at the mosque on Sunday
Friday, kaffir!

62094480
>>62094396
>Friday, kaffir!
Ah yes Arjun hajji, I have forgotten. Of course! Praise Allah, the al-ilah, all-powerful God. We are the chosen people. Everyone else is a goy. We shall rule the world with our DOTs, the crypto of Islam. Praise be Allah Christ Vishnu.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62094791
>>62089608
>>62093506
>>62094480

Stop larping as an Indian

62095346
>>62094791
Good job Panjali. Bump the thread you I can bump it off your comment. Our small village of Mumbai shall eat for a year of this thread alone.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62097729
Dear Mumbai warriors,

I hope you slurped the bottom. I hope you inhaled the smell for it is time. It is time to go back to where we belong. To 55$ and beyond. Mumbai warriors, it is OUR TIME.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62097956
bump for polkacurry

62098919
>>62097956
Yes, my fren Rohit. We, the Mumbai Warriors, will eat the best PolkaCurry there is. We shall express gratefulness to our lord Wood while we eat with SPOONS I tell you my friend. The time where we ate with our bare hands is over Rohit. We shall consume our PolkaCurry with a metal SPOON Rohit. Today, we embark into the bright new future that was laid out thanks to our spiritual leader Lord Wood. Vishnu of the mindchain bless him. Oh Rohit, how far we have come. The Mumbai warriors shall bring the whole of Mumbai, the city of DOT, into a bright future. Soon the period of enlightenment begins. Mumbai warriors, if you can hear me, give me your best BATTLE SHOUT !!!

Shouts: "TOGETHER WE STAND UNITED AS PROUD MAN OF THE MIND CHAIN. RISE MY BRETHREN. RISE MY WARRIORS. TAKE UP YOUR ARMS AND LET'S FIGHT FOR OUT GLORIOUS LORD WOOD. FOR MUMBAI, THE CITY OF DOT AAAAAAAAAAA"

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62099150
>>62097729
Aren't you shorting DOT?

62099687
>>62099150
PSSSTTT, Panjali. Do I look like a Nintendo to you? Stop playing me and telling them the plan. Panjali, shut your mouth or no PolkaCurry for you young Vishnu mind. Do you want the Mumbai warriors to eat with metal spoons or with their hands? Do you want an age of enlightenment? If yes, then give us your best battle shout my young Vishnu warrior. Scream so hard that Gavin Wood, our spiritual leader, will hear your voice a top mount Hyjal.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62100207
>>62099687
based street shitting dot preacher

62101334
>>62100207
Thank you. I try my best to be the best street shitter DOT preacher. We get paid really good and therefore we eat with metal spoons and not with our hands.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62102768
Remember my young Vishnus of the mindchain. THIS YEAR NOMT + JAM go live on DOT (and other major upgrades). With that DOT will position itself to be about 10 years ahead of the competition. The bull market bottom has probably already been reached. Even if we go lower it won't be for more than like 10%. Maybe we'll get a black swan event mid summer, maybe we won't. The next cycle is probably going to be THE SUPER CYCLE, THE GOLDEN BULL RUN. I would position myself in a project that has some utility like DOT. The meme coin bullshitery is OVER. People are going to go back to their roots. There is no more stupidity left in the market. If you guys can't understand that then so help you Vishnu.

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62102845
Just realized this thread has been up for more than a month.

62102949
>>62102845
Yes, I've been saying that I'm paid by Gavin Wood directly and that we, the Mumbai warrirors, are eating with metal spoons instead of our hands because of it!

>>62068446
>>62071796
>>62071796
>>62079572

The Mumbai warriors are winning and we're entering a time of enlightenment in Mumbai because of it. PolkaCurry for everyone. Join us

62103152
My Mumbai warriors, my young Vishnus of the mind chain. Remember. This is THE bull run. I hope you are stacking. For this bull run will decide the winners from the losers. This is the GOLDEN bull run everyone has been talking about. This is IT. The decisive moment where the projects that will become the new Nvidia, Amazon, Google. Choose wisely my young Mumbai warriors for reality is not what it seems. If a coin has no utility. If the network can't handle millions of TPS at a cheap cost then there is no point in investing into it. DOT has everything anyone would think of as an important feature to have and soon, this year, JAM and NOMT and other major upgrades will hit. It'll revolutionize what the sector STANDARD is. Soon my brethren we will be called THE CHAIN. We will be a major focal point, a nexus if you will, for the whole Web3 world. We will be the center and the bridge for every other chain. Enlightenment is upon us my Mumbai warriors. Rise my brethren, rise into a new dawn of magic.

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62103167
Kafir token!

item.title: How do I avoid taxes? — 39 replies — 15.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
How do I avoid taxes?

Open thread • Replies: 39 • Updated: 2026-04-11 15:08 UTC

OP

I have maxxed out my TFSA (tax-free saving account for Canadians) and I still have like 50k in my chequing. I want investment options where I get free money and I don't pay the government. I have a RDSP account but I can't still understand the 10 year limit nor can I understand why people have RRSP's. Less risky options btw

Early replies (first 3)

62102739
>>62102733
I don't trust any bank manager or any wealth advisor because I think most of em are trynna scam me and they show repulsive facial cues when I ask them questions thinking I am dumb. I just want to earn money and extreme benefit outta money I have.

62102763
Look at and fully understand the tax rates and tax bracket table for your province at taxtips.ca. You will probably see NEGATIVE tax rates for eligible dividends for certain income brackets - eg for Ontario below $58k income, your eligible dividend income is taxed at a negative rate. There are ETF products designed to pay you income of that type, though they are usually comatose boomer investments that won't grow much over time.

That being said, nothing beats capital gains for low taxes. Volatile, high growth stuff will get you capital gains over time and you will be living like a Laurentian Elite paying very little taxes on passive income.

Also underrated:
> paying off debt
> RRSP contributions when you have high employment income
> making side money flipping stuff in the cash economy and forgetting to claim it on your taxes
> having kids and getting the child care tax benefit

62102785
>>62102763
>> making side money flipping stuff in the cash economy and forgetting to claim it on your taxes
how do I get into this?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62102874
>>62102733
>nor can I understand why people have RRSP's
Usually tax-deferred income for when you're retired, and your income becomes lower so you don't have to worry about the gains

62102888
>>62102874
Yah but what if i die by the age 35?

62102898
>>62102733
If your tax bracket is high then put as much income as you can into RRSP to get that 50% tax back. RRSP only becomes a problem to deal with if you die. Retire early and draw down the RRSP when you have no income.

The best way to not pay the government is to leave this god forsaken place.

62102940
>>62102888
you can still withdraw it, you just have to be strategic about it. keeping 50k in your checking account is giga retarded. youre getting raped by inflation. if you have taxable income for the year and you have money sitting in your checking account you should consider making contributions so you pay less tax. if your income tax is withheld by your employer you may even get a refund. I got 10k this year. if you know exactly how much youre going to be contributing for the year you can request to reduce your tax at the source by sending some forms to the cra and less tax will be taken off of your paycheck

62102980
>>62102739
FUCK anyone who works at a bank. Seriously.

62103032
>>62102733
Do you own a property? If you never bought one you can put money in fhsa, which works like an RRSP but when you buy your first property you can use this money. With property prices actually going down it's a good opportunity to buy.

62103038
>>62103032
I invested money in the mortgage and paid off my parents house that I live in.
>prices are decreasing
Like wat? From a houss costing 1m to 800k? Lmao

62103045
>>62103038
Yes? That's 20% no?

62103054
>>62102733
RRSP’s are a bet that your ordinary income tax level will be lower in retirement than it is now. This is something you can calculate if you want to try to plan your income level and tax strategy when you retire.

62103060
You can use contributions to:

RRSP
RESP
FHSA

To reduce your taxes and get more money back.

62103063
>>62103038
Is your name on the title of the house officially or are you just using a convoluted way of saying your parents, whose house you live in, charge you rent. If you have never been on a mortgage, or have never bought a home in your name for the first time, you have access to an FHSA.

62103065
>>62103063
I am on the title

62103090
Look into flow-through shares if you're looking for tax write offs. You can't use tax advantage accounts for this strategy. Also use your line of credit to invest in yield producing assets. The interest is deductible and you pocket the difference. Little more risky since you're exposed to interest rate fluctuations but still worth it if you don't have real responsibilities like kids. Once again, can't be in a tax advantage account.

62103103
>>62102739
yeah don't fuck with banks or "wealth managers", they're there to fuck you over

62103197
>>62102848
> holy retarded. how did you manage to fuck up that badly? did you mean to send the money to a different account?

Yep. I have my RRSP hidden now so I don’t make that mistake again

62103347
>>62102733
>I have a RDSP account

Are you scamming the system or are you actually profoundly disabled?

62103616
>>62103090
>Also use your line of credit to invest in yield producing assets.
Wdym by this?

62103644
>>62102823
>depends on what you're interested in and good at. Go to garage sales in boomer neighborhoods and lowball stuff that can be easily sold on Facebook/Kijij/etc. If you know cars, lowball badly listed dirty cars, clean them up and re-sell them.
What if nobody buys my stuff?

62103741
>>62103616
If you use a LoC to buy a stock that gives a dividend. The interest you pay is tax deductible.

62103827
>>62103741
But what if the interest is higher then the profit? What if my stocks collapse? And by line of credit you mean just borrowing money from my credit cards or borrow new loans? Which options do I have

62103836
>>62103827
Do not borrow money to buy stocks for fucks sakes. He doesn't understand what tfsa and rrsp are. Read 2-3 books first, buy either vfv or voo / qqq or qld for long term. Keep buying until you die, fuck off

62103843
I have tfsa maxed, rrsp maxed, resp for kids, corporate cash account where I invest all surplus $ in the company and a personal cash account. Between all accounts I hold TQQQ.TO mostly. Tax is a fucking bitch but it beats keeping cash

62103850
>>62103836
I Normally would agree but

62103914
>>62103836
>Do not borrow money to buy stocks for fucks sakes
Then what does LOC mean?

62103923
>>62103616
I'm nta but I took a LoC to do options wheels strategy on stocks I don't mind holding long-term because you need a lot of capital to do this. Let's see how this goes.

62103929
>>62102823
>Gains are not taxed, but what you take out of RRSPs after it has grown is taxed.
Doesn't that literally mean the same thing? Why do guys in finance use semantics like this. No wonder kikes and rich people lie alot. Well if 'x' isn't taxes initally, its gonna be taxxed later on, so basically its the same stuff. You get 'taxed'. I hated finance because of this

62103938
>buy gold, silver, platinum with cash
>sell gold, silver, platinum for cash

My grandfather just sold five ounces he bought twenty years ago to another boomer over Facebook market place. No paper trail. (Inb4 faceberg monitors/saves chats)

62103957
>>62103938
Yah but ppl suspect you're a fraud

62103961
>>62103929
ya gotta find your kike mindset and stop dumb goying

It WILL NOT be taxed if your realized income out of your RRSP is KEPT LOW in a future year. It will be taxed a lot if you take a lot of realized income out of your RRSP. It's designed to shift income from your high earning years to your low earning years. That's why it's called tax planning, because you have to plan. Also, you can trade between assets in a RRSP without it being a taxable event.

Capital gains is different. Every time you sell in a naked account, that's a taxable event and it makes it harder to plan, especially with volatile assets.

If corn ETF moons 100x in your RRSP, you sell and re-invest in whatever, no tax consequences until you withdraw which you have a lot of control over.

If corn ETF moons 100x in a regular account, you owe capital gains the moment you sell, which is a big cheque for Mr. Carney

62103963
>>62103644
then you are a shitty businessman and you should claim your capital losses against your income

item.title: It costs 300k to raise a kid — 9 replies — 13.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
It costs 300k to raise a kid

Open thread • Replies: 9 • Updated: 2026-04-11 16:58 UTC

OP

WTF are normies doing? What are they even spending money on?
Now women refuse to have kids because it'll nuke their lifestyle, while destitute browns have 10 kids.

>buy diapers
>food cost is negligible
>hand me down clothes
>wife does child care
>public school is free

I bet /biz/ could raise a kid on 20k.

Early replies (first 3)

62104065
>>62104059
Basterd benchid donut rase da kid! Shalom rabbi!

62104067
>>62104059
govs keep raising taxes as if that doesnt have a cost. "its only 750 more dollars this year bro! gotta pay for bloated bureaucracy bro!"

62104095
>>62104059
I do believe you also factor in opportunity costs. you support a child for what? 20-25 years? thats money that could have been in the stock market. I child also requires you to move into a better neighborhood, bigger apartment, bigger car and everything else that comes with it. 200-300k sounds realistic over that time span. just because you can live frugally, doesnt mean your child can.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62104104
>>62104059
Why does every media picture that has a baby involved always has brown babies in it and whenever abortion or anti-natalism is involved there use pics of white people and babies?

62104107
>>62104104
Jews have plans and u know it, dont ask stupid questions!

62104113
>>62104059
Women don't want to have kids and I don't blame them. Human pregnancy is inefficient compared to other animals due to the head size of human babies. It radically changes the body and the person for the rest of their life. There is minimal "bounce" back. The brain changes. We will have artificial wombs one day, so these issues of people not having or wanting children will be moot when an artificial incubator can do all the work. They'll also be able to make babies from your skin, so you won't even need to find a woman to procreate with anymore if you so choose.

62104117
>>62104113
Hey vitalik! Hows mainnet scaling?

62104123
>>62104059
>wife does child care
This thing alone will cost millions in lost opportunity. You realize that now both of your retirements are on you?

62104153
>>62104059
Every time I see someone with kids I am thankful I'm not them. I can't imagine spending 300k on them and having no freedom or free time. inb4 /biz/ copes about kids being cheap because of "muh hand me downs" and "muh food is cheap". We all know that's bullshit just like your 200k remote do-nothing job and 8 inch dick.

62102511

62102526

62102538

62102617
>>62102456

62103304
>>62102446

62103307

62103321

62103325
>>62103321
very funny wagie, we could use that sense of humour down at the warehouse. See you 0600 Monday morning

62103361
who really care about hair when you have this much money? fucking poorwagies coping

62103444
>>62103321
>”Yeah well umm umm, I at least have hair and you don’t”

I’m sure Jeff just shed a tear from his yacht in the Mediterranean

62103475
>>62103325

62103566
>>62103361

62103627
>>62102446
Everyday is Groundhog Day for us NEETs

62103659
based jeff, lord of the wagecage

62103714
I'm shitting on the clock right now, getting paid overtime.

62104042
does anyone have any good shoes for warehouse slaving
My feet fucking hurt I can't stand it

item.title: Best peptide stock: BACHEM holding — 20 replies — 7.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
Best peptide stock: BACHEM holding

Open thread • Replies: 20 • Updated: 2026-04-11 14:57 UTC

OP

okay listen up, i'll keep it short.

NO ONE, literally NO ONE, is talking about this stock. not on reddit, nor on X.

and I urge you to verify everything i say, but it will take you max 10 minutes.

assuming you are bullish on peptides (gray, black and white market). this is the BEST instrument to express this bullishness.

brief facts:

1) marketcap 5B
2) profitable, pays dividend, swiss
3) founding family owns ~58% of the shares
4) supplies to Novo, Eli Lily, etc
5) didn't pump yet

30%+ EBITDA margins, 35-45% expected sales growth in 2026

if you are bullish on peptides, this is a no-brainer. ive seen many people unfortunately buying HIMS, Hong-Kong listed scams or even solana tokens to express their peptide thesis. no bueno.

i just longed 1.6MM USD

i post more details on x under tdkcznsky (also if you want to know how the fuck i can ape 1.6MM)

Early replies (first 3)

62098509
have you ever had a big pharma win before? just be careful theyre really scammy

62098518
>>62098490
I’m bullish on oral peptides. Ozempic tier shit is already saturated. BPC-157 for example. Unfortunately can’t really be monetized.

62098524
>>62098509
only moderna during the plandemic. got burned on many smaller french pharma stocks and anything that's waiting an "imminent" approval. that's not my thing no. burned and learned.

the thing with bachem is its a super solid company (look it up, look at the management team, the operational sites, and the compounds theyre making and who they are supplying to)

theres zero hype or buzz around this stock, i found it on a deep dive.

still. you need to be bullish on peptides for this to make sense ( I am tho)

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62098530
>>62098490
you could just buy SNDK or MU and be rich

AMD, MRVL, the list goes on

62098535
>>62098530
im already rich and i HAVE traded sndk and mu, but pretty scary to long these for size here and hold it thru the volatility

62098559
>i post more details on x under tdkcznsky (also if you want to know how the fuck i can ape 1.6MM)
ah so this is the real point of this thread kek, you're selling a course.

62098583
>>62098559
no im not. all trading courses are scams. paid groups are scams. ta is a scam, signals are a scam. substacks are fill and shills.

i just wanted to frontrun brokies asking how i can ape a million and whether my parents are rich (cope. theyre poor)

62098592
>>62098559
while i appreciate diligence dont let blind scepsis prevent you from doing the trade of your life. just look into the ticker yourself and ignore the messenger if you must. its that simple.

62098950
>5b MC

62099205
>>62098583
>i just wanted to frontrun brokies asking how i can ape a million and whether my parents are rich (cope. theyre poor)
I don't think anyone cares.

62099357
>>62098490
800k not 1.6m usd lol

62099747
>>62098490
>trades on pink sheets
>actual mcap is 6B
I don't think I'm touching this

62099787
>>62098490
Where to buy this shitcoin?

62100230
20,000 shares at 64 CHF = 1.6MM USD

primary listing is on SIX Swiss Exchange under the ticker BANB, there's a US ADR but it's not as liquid. ticker BHCMY


any decent broker will allow you to trade it. for IBKR you might have to request access, but that's free of charge.

ibkr is goated anyway/ step up your game brokies

62100329

62100340
got anything which trades at major US exchanges?

62100348
>>62100340
skm (sk telecom) korean stock but with US listing. its the highest concentrated proxy for anthropic thats public

62100362
>>62100348

62103936
>>62098592
Isn't this the kind of mindset which bankrupts you?
Why would it be the trade of a life with a PE of 32?
The best I can see is it going up by 50% but on what factors could it achieve that?

62103940
stock picking doesnt work, find a stock with a PA that is favorable for an analysis then correlation trade it then profit on either end and make sure your TP is fixed with a stop of intended next FVG zone RRR or sharpe whatever you wanna call it thats you being a retard picking random ass stocks with no analysis of pa

item.title: Advice — 5 replies — 6.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
Advice

Open thread • Replies: 5 • Updated: 2026-04-11 16:49 UTC

OP

I will soon come into possession of 50k euro. It's a decent amount in my shithole. Unfortunately no one teaches kids here about compound interest and investing, so people grow up illiterate in those matters, your truly included.

Now, I work and make enough for pretty much anything I need. I don't have loans, mortgages, credit cards. I own my home fully. I have a car and don't care about a new one desu, so I'd never spend money on that.

What should I do with the 50k? What would you do? Is it worth investing some or all of it and in what?

I thought about spending several thousand on travelling business class around Europe for a couple of months and seeing a bunch of countries I've always wanted to check out (before you sperg out, business class is very cheap cross continent in the EU). Other than that I'm open to suggestions.

Early replies (first 3)

62103618
>>62103496
Hookers and drugs.

62103746
>>62103618
thanks biz

62103760
>>62103496
i have 15 bird friends like him

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62103790
>>62103496
This is the stupidest thing you can do with windfall money. You’re gonna burn out your dopamine receptors in the first week, after that your behavior will escalate and you’ll burn more money seeking the same thrill. When you’re eventually broke and have to come home, regular life will feel bland and desaturated.

Go on one week trips every year for four years with the same money. You’ll have a much better time and your money will go a lot farther.

As for the rest of the money, fold it into a retirement account for tax advantaged growth. All in US stocks for now, then into a target date fund when you hit forty or so.

62104131
>>62103496
Nigger. You have a once in a lifetime opportunity to win at life. Do you really wanna blow it on muh travel like a retarded teenage whore? Just put everything into an ETF of your choice and forget it ever existed. 20 years from now you will want to suck current (you)s dick for such foresight. The reason the faggots on here are barely scraping by despite compound interest being a thing is that they don't have enough starting capital. You don't have that problem, so don't waste the opportunity.
